_doc: The liveness invariant, as DATA: these launchd agents MUST stay alive. scripts/launch-agent-liveness.py enforces it every beat — a down agent whose plist is recoverable is re-bootstrapped locally (restoring a quarantined backup from ~/Library/LaunchAgents.disabled/ if a quiesce moved it); a genuinely-unrecoverable one (plist exists nowhere) is surfaced RED with its exact remediation, never silently dropped. Adding a load-bearing organ = ONE entry here, never a memory chore. This is the 'organ owns its own liveness' form: the REGISTRY (not chat) owns WHICH organs are load-bearing, and the DAEMON (not an ephemeral session) owns keeping them alive. Origin: a 2026-07-09 mass launchd-quiesce (macOS 26.6 fork-crash mitigation) disabled 11 agents and restored only the heartbeat, leaving the MONETA revenue rail dark for days while armed-valve-audit saw it down every beat with no effector (the sensor-without-effector defect this closes).

agents.label: com.limen.moneta
agents.role: MONETA sovereign mint — the first-dollar revenue rail origin (node/tsx on :8787)

agents.label: com.limen.moneta-tunnel
agents.role: Cloudflare tunnel fronting mint.4444j99.dev -> the mint origin

agents.label: com.limen.creds-hydrate
agents.role: credential organ — hydrates + verifies every secret each beat (creds-hydrate)

agents.label: com.ianva.gateway
agents.role: ianva MCP doorway — keeps the gateway alive across reboot (lever L-IANVA-LOCAL)
